description: Model a closed-loop recycling system for a '50% rPET Bottle' using the USLCI database (~/LCA_Imports/uslci_database.zip). The system requires the creation of 'rPET Flake', 'Scrap Bottle', and '50% rPET Bottle' flows. Define the 'Bottle Manufacturing' process (inputs: 0.5 kg 'rPET Flake', 0.5 kg Virgin PET from USLCI, and Electricity; output: 1.0 kg '50% rPET Bottle'), the 'Use and Collection' process (input: 1.0 kg '50% rPET Bottle'; output: 0.95 kg 'Scrap Bottle'), and the 'Recycling Operations' process (input: 1.0 kg 'Scrap Bottle' and Electricity; output: 0.9 kg 'rPET Flake'). Link these processes into a product system named 'Circular PET System' where manufacturing pulls from recycling. Calculate the LCIA using TRACI 2.1 (GWP/Global Warming) and export the results to ~/LCA_Results/circular_pet_result.csv.
